ruleContent.replaceRegex:
##{{chapter.title}}.*|\(本章完\)|最⊥新⊥.*|必.+搜.+日.+最.*
@js:
var r = result
r=r.replace(/「/gi,'“')
.replace(/」/gi,'”')

ruleToc.chapterList: var html = String(result); var root = String(baseUrl).replace(/#.*$/, '').replace(/p-\d+\.html$/, ''); if (root.charAt(root.length - 1) !== '/') root += '/'; var maxPage = 1, m; var pageRe = /]+value=["'](\d+)["'][^>]*>/gi; while ((m = pageRe.exec(html)) !== null) { var pageNo = parseInt(m[1], 10); if (pageNo > maxPage) maxPage = pageNo; } var extra = ''; for (var page = 2; page <= maxPage; page++) { var more = java.ajax(root + 'p-' + page + '.html'); if (more) { var part = String(more).match(/]+id=["']list["'][^>]*>[\s\S]*?]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/ul>/i); if (part) extra += part[1]; } } if (extra) { var listStart = html.search(/]+id=["']list["'][^>]*>/i); var listEnd = html.indexOf('', listStart); if (listEnd >= 0) html = html.slice(0, listEnd) + extra + html.slice(listEnd); } html; @CSS:#list li a
ruleToc.chapterName: text##[\(\{（｛【].*[首为求更谢乐发推票章盟第补合感订加字KkWw\/].*[\)\}）｝】]
